review_output_format: {SEVERITY} {RULE-ID} / {Problem description} / {Why it violates the rule} / {Suggested fix}

severity_levels.ERROR: Blocks merge — architectural violation or broken Standard rule
severity_levels.WARNING: Should be addressed — style or quality concern weakening the Standard
severity_levels.INFO: Educational note — does not block merge

example_comment: ERROR tsr-broker-001 / StudentBroker calls axios directly in a view service / Brokers must be the only layer calling HTTP clients / Move the axios call into a dedicated StudentBroker
